name: Summer Beach Environment — Cozy Pixel Art Nature & Scenery
description:
Build a sun-soaked beach paradise! From towering palm trees and intricate sandcastles to dramatic sunsets and the jolly ice cream truck.

✨ **Includes:**
• 18 environment & scenery sprites (32×32)
• Palm trees, seashells, sandcastles, coral reefs & MORE
• Atmospheric pieces (sunset, clouds, waves)
• Full sprite sheet strip
• CC0 license

**Perfect for:** Beach resort games, island adventures, coastal exploration games, and cozy vacation sims.
**Quality Score:** 8.1/10 — Curator Approved with Distinction
